writeup: The Buffalo Bills found themselves in the spotlight roughly one week after the 2026 NFL Draft concluded in Pittsburgh, with analysts and fans alike dissecting the team's selections and assigning grades. New head coach Joe Brady's influence on the draft strategy drew significant attention as observers evaluated how his offensive vision shaped Buffalo's picks. Meanwhile, Damar Hamlin continued to inspire beyond the football field, participating in a Guinness World Record CPR awareness event that underscored his remarkable journey since his 2023 cardiac arrest. Draft graders at outlets like Pro Football Focus weighed in on how the Bills positioned themselves for a Super Bowl run under Brady's leadership. The week painted a picture of a franchise balancing optimism from a fresh coaching regime with the ongoing human story of one of its most beloved players.

articles.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Full Team Grades and Recap Analysis
